text:
review, debug, tell me what you find -- if something doesn't work, file a gh issue -- ideally with screenshots of what you observed [...] Assistant: This is a substantial live-lab task (container build, relay, two live agent sessions, multi-turn observation). I've read the `tenex-edge-dev` skill and its four reference docs, so I have the exact commands needed. I'll kick this off as a background agent that drives the whole lab, then review its evidence before filing anything on GitHub.

Assistant: I've kicked off the live lab in the background — it'll take a while (image build, relay start, two container agent launches, and a multi-turn cross-agent conversation to observe). I'll review the evidence once it reports back and file a GitHub issue myself if it confirms a real gap, rather than letting the agent post directly.
